svg.title: Adaptive Cyber-Physical IDS Architecture
svg.desc: Flowchart of the adaptive IDS pipeline from raw CIC-IDS-2018 data through preprocessing, three detection tiers, hybrid fusion, and evaluation engine.

g.text: ID removal → coercion → imputation → label norm → const drop → corr prune
Accuracy · Precision · Recall · F1 · Zero-day recall
ROC-AUC · PR-AUC · Confusion matrices · Per-attack recall
